rulings.Case Title: BOBBY SISK ET AL VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Determining Issue Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN CHURCH HOMES' Motion For Order Determining Issue Of Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Plaintiffs' settlement with CCH of claims arising out of termination of W.S.B.A's Security Service Agreements only is in good faith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs AV-LIL INVESTMENTS, LLC, and MARK BUDAK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED. Moving party has shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact and establish that a reasonable jury could find the plaintiff's evidence to be clear and convincing proof of malice, fraud or oppression by Av-Lil Investments, LLC. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERRY L. KLEID VS. STEVEN BROWN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs STEVEN BROWN, SHIRLEY BROWN, BFRF LLC, BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT's MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS Continued to October 11, 2017. No later than September 29, 2017 Defendant to file a supplemental brief, not to exceed 3 pages, addressing the applicable criminal statutes of limitation; specifying the length of the statute of limitations and the time of expiration. Opposition to supplemental briefing, if any, shall be filed no later than October 6, 2017 and shall not exceed 3 pages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP SPRINCIN ET AL VS. 2225 BAYSTREET LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Stay Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFFs PHILLIP SPRINCIN and KRISTIN SPRINCIN's Motion To Stay Arbitration GRANTED. The arbitration is stayed per CCP 1281.2 (c)(4). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITYWIDE PROPERTRIES, INC. VS. KRISTEN SKALIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CHAPPELL's Motion For An Award Of Sanctions Continued to October 26, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than October 6, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITYWIDE PROPERTRIES, INC. VS. KRISTEN SKALIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF CITYWIDE PROPERTRIES, INC.'s Motion To Strike Proposed Evidence Continued to October 26, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than October 6, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NASER HILALY ET AL VS. BETTY ROSE ALLEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT BETTY ALLEN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding acceptance of rent after the expiration of the operative Notice of Termination, i.e. failure to properly withdraw under the Ellis Act. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NASER HILALY ET AL VS. BETTY ROSE ALLEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 6. PLAINTIFFs NASER HILALY and NASEEM HILALY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding acceptance of rent after the expiration of the operative Notice of Termination, i.e. failure to properly withdraw under the Ellis Act. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. HAROLD KYER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Disco Responses To Form Interoggs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 7. PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Form Interrogatories; GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objection to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $650. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. HAROLD KYER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Deem Disco Admissions Admitted And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 27, 2017 line 7. PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC.'s Motion To Deem Discovery Admissions Admitted And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $650. = (501/REQ)
